---
title: "Botany"
toc: false
---

## Slides

- [Day 1: Introduction](day1/index.qmd)

- [Day 2: Topic 2](day2/index.qmd)

- [Day 3: Topic 3](day3/index.qmd)

- [Day 4: Topic 4](day4/index.qmd)

- [Day 5: Topic 5](day5/index.qmd)

- [Day 6: Topic 6](day6/index.qmd)

- [Day 7: Topic 7](day7/index.qmd)

- [On-Demand: Self-Paced Content](on-demand/index.qmd)

## Important Dates

- Day 1: [Date TBD]
- Day 2: [Date TBD]
- Day 3: [Date TBD]
- Day 4: [Date TBD]
- Day 5: [Date TBD]
- Day 6: [Date TBD]
- Day 7: [Date TBD]

## Office Hours

By appointment, please send an email to [your-email@example.com]

## Syllabus

- [Link to syllabus TBD]
